info.title: Multi Outlet POS Kopi Kopi & Inventory API
info.description: API Specification for Multi Outlet POS Kopi Popi & Inventory System.

get.description: Fetch a list of all users in the system. Admin can see everyone (including other Admins, Managers, Cashiers, and Customers). Manager can only see employees in their branch.

patch.description: Partial update for user profile. PATCH is used because it updates only specific fields without replacing the entire object.

get.description: Public users see only basic info. Does NOT include BOM/Recipe.
Includes Recipe (BOM) only if requester is Admin or Manager and adds ?include_recipe=true.
Fetch a list of all branches. Public users see only active branches. Admins see all branches.

parameters.name: include_inactive
parameters.description: If true, includes inactive branches (Admin only).

delete.description: Sets is_active to false instead of physical deletion.

patch.summary: Toggle Accepting Orders / Emergency Open Close (Admin, Manager, Cashier)

post.summary: Create a new restock request (Manager only)
Mencatat kedatangan barang dari Supplier ke Gudang Pusat (Admin Only)

200.description: Stok berhasil diterima dan dimasukkan ke gudang pusat

post.summary: Mendistribusikan / mengatur stok ke cabang lain memotong dari Gudang Pusat (Admin Only)

400.description: Bad Request atau stok Gudang Pusat tidak cukup

get.summary: Get My Cart (Customer) / Get Offline Carts (Cashier)

get.description: Get all promos (Admin) or active promos (others)

post.description: Check if promo is valid and calculate discount

get.summary: Get My Expenses for Current Shift

post.description: Upload a file to the server. Supports JPG, JPEG, PNG, and WEBP. Maximum size is 5MB.

get.description: Ambil daftar notifikasi (In-App) milik user yang sedang login.

data.title: Stok Menipis
data.message: Stok Susu UHT sisa 2 Liter di Cabang 1

put.description: Tandai sebuah notifikasi telah dibaca oleh user.

post.description: Endpoint for Midtrans to send notifications about transaction status changes.
